name: I'm in front of the FUN HOUSE
description: I'm in front of the FUN HOUSE
hints: Read the sign for important rules. You need a ticket to enter safely.
Go to the counter and SAY TICK to ask for a ticket. You need money first.
You need the $5 bill from the parking lot (E). GO COUN, then SAY TICK, then DROP BILL to pay.
DO NOT just GO FUN without a ticket - it's fatal! Get the bill from room 26 first.

effects: Message: Ticket lady asks me what I want

Message: Park closes at midnight. Shoes required at all times.
Management NOT responsible for accidents!!
CAUTION this park is DANGERous!
Message: She says: `That'll be a dollar`

notes: Starting room. Read the sign for rules (shoes required!). You must buy a ticket before entering the fun house. GO FUN without a ticket is fatal. Get the $5 bill from the parking lot (E) first.
